debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v_1 ih w w_1 : V
p_1 : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G w ih
h_ind :
  Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1) + 1
h : G.Adj w_1 w
h_support :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w_1 ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G w_1 w ih h p_1) =
    insert w_1 (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1)
h_edge :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w_1 ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G w_1 w ih h p_1) =
    @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1
hv : w_1 ∉ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1
H : s(w_1, w) ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1
left : (w, w_1) ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts V G w ih p_1
right : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge V (w, w_1) = s(w_1, w)
⊢ w_1 ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support V G w ih p_1

proof:
have mem_of_darts : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {x y}, (x, y) ∈ p.darts → y ∈ p.support := by
                intro u v p x y h
                induction p with
                | nil => cases h
                | cons h' p' ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  cases h with
                  | inl h_eq =>
                    rw [h_eq.2]
                    right
                    cases p' <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | inr h_mem =>
                    right
                    exact ih h_mem
                | loop p' ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  cases h with
                  | inl h_eq =>
                    rw [h_eq.2]
                    left; rfl
                  | inr h_mem =>
                    right
                    exact ih h_mem
              exact mem_of_darts p_1 left
failed_attempts:
have mem_of_mem_darts : ∀ {u v : V} (q : G.LoopWalk u v) (d : V × V), d ∈ q.darts → d.2 ∈ q.support := by
                intro u v q d hd
                induction q with
                | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                | cons h q ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  cases hd with
                  | inl h_eq =>
                    subst h_eq
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    cases q <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | inr h_in =>
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    exact ih _ h_in
                | loop q ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  cases hd with
                  | inl h_eq =>
                    subst h_eq
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | inr h_in =>
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    exact ih _ h_in
              apply mem_of_mem_darts p_1 _
              assumption

revert left
              induction p_1 with
              | nil => simp
              | cons _ p' ih' =>
                intro left
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at left ⊢
                cases left
                · subst_vars; right; cases p' <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                · right; apply ih'; assumption
              | loop p' ih' =>
                intro left
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at left ⊢
                cases left
                · subst_vars; simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                · right; apply ih'; assumption

have mem_of_dart : ∀ d ∈ p_1.darts, d.2 ∈ p_1.support := by
                intro d hd
                induction p_1 with
                | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                | cons _ p' ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  rcases hd with rfl | hd
                  · right
                    cases p' <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  · right; exact ih hd
                | loop p' ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  rcases hd with rfl | hd
                  · left; rfl
                  · right; exact ih hd
              exact mem_of_dart (w, w_1) left

have mem_of_darts : ∀ {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {d : V × V}, d ∈ p.darts → d.2 ∈ p.support := by
                intro u v p d hd
                induction p with
                | nil => simp [LoopWalk.darts] at hd; cases hd
                | cons h p' ih =>
                  simp [LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  simp [LoopWalk.support]
                  cases hd with
                  | head h_eq =>
                    rw [h_eq.2]
                    apply Or.inr
                    cases p' <;> simp [LoopWalk.support]
                  | tail h_mem =>
                    apply Or.inr
                    exact ih h_mem
                | loop p' ih =>
                  simp [LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  simp [LoopWalk.support]
                  cases hd with
                  | head h_eq =>
                    rw [h_eq.2]
                    apply Or.inl
                    rfl
                  | tail h_mem =>
                    apply Or.inr
                    exact ih h_mem
              apply mem_of_darts p_1 left

have : ∀ d ∈ p_1.darts, d.2 ∈ p_1.support := by
                induction p_1 with
                | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts]
                | cons _ p ih =>
                  intro d hd; simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  cases hd
                  · rw [‹d = _›]; cases p <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; right; exact ih _ ‹_›
                | loop p ih =>
                  intro d hd; simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  cases hd
                  · rw [‹d = _›]; simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; right; exact ih _ ‹_›
              apply this; assumption

have mem_support_of_mem_darts : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {x y}, (x, y) ∈ p.darts → y ∈ p.support := by
                intro u v p x y h
                induction p with
                | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                | cons _ p ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at h ⊢
                  rcases h with rfl | h
                  · right
                    cases p <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  · right; exact ih h
                | loop p ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at h ⊢
                  rcases h with rfl | h
                  · left; rfl
                  · right; exact ih h
              apply mem_support_of_mem_darts p_1; assumption

induction p_1 with
              | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at left
              | cons _ p' ih =>
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at left
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  right
                  cases p' <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  right
                  exact ih h
              | loop p' ih =>
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at left
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  right
                  exact ih h

induction p_1 with
              | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at left
              | cons h p_tail ih =>
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_mem
                · right
                  cases p_tail <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                · right; exact ih h_mem
              | loop p_tail ih =>
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_mem
                · left; rfl
                · right; exact ih h_mem

have mem_support_of_mem_darts : ∀ {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {x y : V}, (x, y) ∈ p.darts → y ∈ p.support := by
                intro u v p x y h
                induction p with
                | nil => simp at h
                | cons _ p' ih =>
                  simp at h
                  cases h with
                  | inl h_eq =>
                    rw [h_eq]
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    cases p' <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | inr h_mem =>
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    exact ih h_mem
                | loop p' ih =>
                  simp at h
                  cases h with
                  | inl h_eq =>
                    rw [h_eq]
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | inr h_mem =>
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    exact ih h_mem
              apply mem_support_of_mem_darts p_1 left

have mem_support_of_mem_darts : ∀ {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {x y : V}, (x, y) ∈ p.darts → y ∈ p.support := by
                intro u v p x y h
                induction p with
                | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                | cons _ p_rest ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                  rcases h with rfl | h
                  · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    cases p_rest <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    apply ih h
                | loop _ ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                  rcases h with rfl | h
                  · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    apply ih h
              exact mem_support_of_mem_darts p_1 left

have mem_of_darts {u' v' x y : V} (q : G.LoopWalk u' v') (h : (x, y) ∈ q.darts) : y ∈ q.support := by
                induction q with
                | nil => simp [darts] at h
                | cons _ q' ih' =>
                  simp [darts] at h
                  cases h
                  · obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := ‹_›
                    right
                    cases q' <;> simp [support]
                  · right; exact ih' ‹_›
                | loop q' ih' =>
                  simp [darts] at h
                  cases h
                  · obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := ‹_›
                    simp [support]
                  · right; exact ih' ‹_›
              exact mem_of_darts p_1 left

induction p_1 generalizing left with
              | nil => intro left; simp [LoopWalk.darts] at left
              | cons _ p' ih =>
                intro left
                simp only [LoopWalk.darts, LoopWalk.support, List.mem_cons] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                · apply Or.inr
                  cases p' <;> simp [LoopWalk.support]
                · apply Or.inr; exact ih h
              | loop p' ih =>
                intro left
                simp only [LoopWalk.darts, LoopWalk.support, List.mem_cons] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                · apply Or.inl; rfl
                · apply Or.inr; exact ih h

have mem_of_darts : ∀ {u v} (q : G.LoopWalk u v) {d}, d ∈ q.darts → d.2 ∈ q.support := by
                intro u v q d hd
                induction q with
                | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                | cons _ p' ih' =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  cases hd with
                  | head h =>
                    rw [h]
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    cases p' <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | tail _ h =>
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    exact ih' h
                | loop p' ih' =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  cases hd with
                  | head h =>
                    rw [h]
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | tail _ h =>
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                    right
                    exact ih' h
              exact mem_of_darts p_1 left

have h : (w, w_1) ∈ p_1.darts := by aesop
              induction p_1 with
              | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
              | cons _ p' ih =>
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at h ⊢
                cases h with
                | head h => rw [h]; right; cases p' <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                | tail h => right; exact ih h
              | loop p' ih =>
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at h ⊢
                cases h with
                | head h => rw [h]; right; cases p' <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                | tail h => right; exact ih h

induction p_1 with

                · right; exact ih h_dart
              | loop p' ih =>

                · left; rfl
                · right; exact ih h_dart

induction p_1 with

                · right; exact ih h
              | loop p' ih =>

                rcases left with rfl | h
                · left; rfl
                · right; exact ih h

have h_start {u' v'} (q : G.LoopWalk u' v') : u' ∈ q.support := by
                cases q <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
              have h_mem {u' v'} (q : G.LoopWalk u' v') {x y} (h : (x, y) ∈ q.darts) : y ∈ q.support := by
                induction q with
                | nil => simp at h
                | cons _ q ih =>
                  simp at h
                  cases h with
                  | inl h => rw [h]; simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; right; exact h_start q
                  | inr h => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; right; exact ih h
                | loop q ih =>
                  simp at h
                  cases h with
                  | inl h => rw [h]; simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | inr h => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; right; exact ih h
              apply h_mem p; assumption

have h_support_eq_darts : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v), p.support = u :: p.darts.map Prod.snd := by
                intro u v p
                induction p <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, *]
              rw [h_support_eq_darts p_1]
              right
              exact List.mem_map_of_mem Prod.snd left

have mem_of_darts {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {d} (hd : d ∈ p.darts) :
                  d.1 ∈ p.support ∧ d.2 ∈ p.support := by
                induction p with
                | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd; contradiction
                | cons h p ih =>
                  rcases hd with rfl | hd
                  · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; constructor
                    · left; rfl
                    · right; cases p <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  · specialize ih hd
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; constructor <;> right <;> exact ih.1 <|> exact ih.2
                | loop p ih =>
                  rcases hd with rfl | hd
                  · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; constructor <;> left <;> rfl
                  · specialize ih hd
                    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; constructor <;> right <;> exact ih.1 <|> exact ih.2
              rcases mem_of_darts p_1 (by assumption) with ⟨h1, h2⟩
              assumption

induction p_1 with
              | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at left
              | cons _ p ih =>
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with rfl | h
                · right; cases p <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                · right; exact ih h
              | loop p ih =>
                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                · left; rfl
                · right; exact ih h
            rcases h_dart_cases with h | h
            · use (w, w_1); rw [h]; simp
            · simp [Prod.ext_iff] at h
              rw [← h.2] at hv
              simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet] at hv
              contradiction
          rcases h_dart with ⟨d, hd, rfl⟩
          have : v ∈ p_1.support := by
            induction p_1 with
            | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at hd
            | cons _ p ih =>
              simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at hd ⊢
              rcases hd with rfl | h
              · right; cases p <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
              · right; exact ih h
            | loop p ih =>
              simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support] at hd ⊢
              rcases hd with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
              · left; rfl
              · right; exact ih h
          simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet] at hv; contradiction
  · sorry

have mem_support_of_mem_darts : ∀ {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {d}, d ∈ p.darts → d.2 ∈ p.support := by

                | loop p ih =>

                  · simp
                  · right
                    exact ih hd
              apply mem_support_of_mem_darts p_1
              assumption

have mem_support_of_dart {u v : V} (walk : G.LoopWalk u v) {d : V × V} (hd : d ∈ walk.darts) : d.2 ∈ walk.support := by
                induction walk with

            cases h_dart_cases <;> aesop

                | cons _ p' ih =>
                  simp [LoopWalk.darts] at h
                  rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                  · simp [LoopWalk.support]; cases p' <;> simp [LoopWalk.support]
                  · simp [LoopWalk.support]; right; exact ih h
                | loop p' ih =>
                  simp [LoopWalk.darts] at h
                  rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                  · simp [LoopWalk.support]
                  · simp [LoopWalk.support]; right; exact ih h
              exact mem_of_darts p_1 left

have mem_of_darts {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {d} (hd : d ∈ p.darts) : d.2 ∈ p.support := by
                induction p with
                | nil => simp [LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                | cons h p ih =>
                  simp [LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  rcases hd with rfl | hd
                  · cases p <;> simp [LoopWalk.support]
                  · simp [LoopWalk.support]; right; apply ih hd
                | loop p ih =>
                  simp [LoopWalk.darts] at hd
                  rcases hd with rfl | hd
                  · simp [LoopWalk.support]
                  · simp [LoopWalk.support]; right; apply ih hd
              apply mem_of_darts p_1 left

have start_mem {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) : u ∈ p.support := by cases p <;> simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
              have mem_of_dart {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {d} : d ∈ p.darts → d.2 ∈ p.support := by
                intro h
                induction p with
                | nil => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                | cons h_adj p ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                  cases h with
                  | inl he => subst he; simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support, start_mem]
                  | inr hm => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; right; exact ih hm
                | loop p ih =>
                  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts] at h
                  cases h with
                  | inl he => subst he; simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
                  | inr hm => simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]; right; exact ih hm
              exact mem_of_dart p_1 left
